description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow set on a spacious, landscaped lot with scattered small trees and a perimeter of shrubs. The building features a complex, multi-hipped roof with several gables and dormers, and a prominent attached garage on one side. The front facade is symmetrical, with evenly spaced windows and a central entrance, while the rear includes a patio area with outdoor seating and a small garden. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, likely stucco or painted siding, and the roof is covered in dark shingles. The property is bordered by a driveway and a row of trees along the street-facing edge, providing privacy and curb appeal. The overall design suggests a blend of contemporary and traditional bungalow elements, with ample outdoor space for recreation and relaxation.
description: A large, modern bungalow with a multi-hipped roof, attached garage, and landscaped lot featuring scattered trees and a perimeter of shrubs. The light-colored exterior and symmetrical window arrangement give it a contemporary yet classic appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical facade, central entrance, attached garage to the right, and a landscaped yard with a row of shrubs along the street.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the driveway, garage entrance, and the arrangement of trees and shrubs along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio area, outdoor seating, garden features, and the back row of trees providing privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side elevation, additional landscaping, and the driveway extending along the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
